Localization.Description: A PowerView script was used. Attackers use the PowerView tool for reconnaissance in Windows domains.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} changed ACL for domain object {object.account.name} using a PowerView script
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} removed user {object.account.name} from the "{object.name}" group using a PowerView script
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} removed computer {object.account.name} from the domain using a PowerView script
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} created domain account {object.account.name} using a PowerView script
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} changed the password for domain object {object.account.name}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} deleted domain account {object.account.name} using a PowerView script
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} added user {object.account.name} to the "{object.name}" group using a PowerView script
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} changed property "{object.property}" for domain object {object.account.name} using a PowerView script
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} added computer {object.account.name} to a domain using a PowerView script
